name: Table
description: A data table with sorting, striping, and hover states.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual variant - `'simple'` (default lines), `'striped'` (alternating row bg), or `'bordered'` (cell borders).

props.name: interactive
props.description: Make body rows clickable/focusable and emit `kb-row-click` events.

props.name: stickyHeader
props.description: Stick the `<thead>` to the top of the scroll container.

props.name: caption
props.description: Caption text shown in a labeled bar above the table.

props.name: sortable
props.description: Enable click-to-sort on header cells (use `data-no-sort` on a `<th>` to opt out).

props.name: searchable
props.description: Show a search toolbar that filters rows by text content.

props.name: resizable
props.description: Enable column-edge drag handles for width adjustment.

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown in the search input.

props.name: emptyText
props.description: Text shown when no rows match the search query (or the table has no rows).

events.name: kb-row-click
events.description: Interactive body row clicked/activated. `detail: { index: number; row: HTMLTableRowElement }`.

events.name: kb-sort
events.description: Sort state changed. `detail: { column: number; direction: 'asc' | 'desc' }`.
